title: sustrophe #4963
definition:
1) a twisting up together, a binding together
 2) a secret combination, a coalition, conspiracy
 3) a concourse of disorderly persons, a riot
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a twisting up together, a binding together
 2) a secret combination, a coalition, conspiracy
 3) a concourse of disorderly persons, a riot

    NASB:  a twisting together, hence a concourse or conspiracy:
